0.text: Indeterminate 2 mm nodules in the posterior aspect of the apical region of the right upper lobe

1.text: Fibrotic changes in the right middle lobe adjacent to the minor fissure

2.text: 2 mm subpleural nodule at the laterobasal level

3.text: Scattered ground-glass opacities in both lungs

4.text: Higher concentration of ground-glass opacities in the basal regions
